title: REE Eats
description:
We are bringing a food overhaul! There are way too many other food mods out there, so we decided to bring ours to the mix!

New food, new crops, BORGIR, new blocks, and new structures to build with, cook with, and explore!
body:
# OVERVIEW
A project to add more to food! In this REEONK Studios mod, we bring salmonella (for eating raw food), tomatoes, lettuce, cheese, ground beef, pizza, burgers, tacos, and more for a wider food diversity! On the block side of things, we have many custom blocks for the varius restaurants, including display cases and cutting boards! 

We are also adding, 7-11, restaurant, and subway-type buildings, to spawn around the world and give you food on the go. Wild lettuce and tomatos can be found around the world, and can be harvested and grown on your own.

[Join the Discord Server!](https://discord.gg/F5mRK66Kgq)


### ***Please note that this project is still in the*** ALPHA ***stage. This means that most features in the current mods versions may be heavily modified, and features may be added or removed.***


# FEATURES
### Salmonella Effect:
Chance of getting it from eating raw food, gives you poison, nausea, and slowness.
### Cutting Board:
Used to chop foods using the Flint Knife and Cleaver.
### Display Case:
Allows you to display items!
### Dexterity Enchantment:
Enchantment for the Flint Knife, pops the items off of the Cutting Board instead of the items saying on it.
### Stove:
Burns logs to heat up the Pan, lit with a flint and steel, has a chance to turn the log into ash. If the Stove fills up with ash, the Stove will stop working. Empty the fuel slot to remove the ash buildup.
### Ash:
All raw food cooked in a furnace will smelt into ash due to the extreme temperatures generated that are hot enough to melt metal.



```
Mods are made using MCreator 2024.2
```
